description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux-aarch64 that runs on push to all branches except those in docs/, ChangeLog*, and certain workflow files, and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow should also trigger on specific version tags. It should have two jobs: build and wheels. The build job runs on a matrix of Python versions and ubuntu-20.04, setting up Python, installing dependencies, building and installing pymssql, and testing with pytest. The wheels job runs on ubuntu-latest, setting up Python and QEMU, building and testing wheels with Docker, and uploading artifacts to PyPI under certain conditions.
